title: Installation
subtitle: Set up Star Citizen on your system
step.configurationTooltip: Set install path, runner, and performance options
step.installationTooltip: Install Wine prefix and RSI Launcher
check.memory.name: Memory
check.memory.tooltip: Star Citizen requires at least 16 GB RAM
check.avx.name: AVX Support
check.avx.tooltip: Advanced Vector Extensions - required by CryEngine
check.mapcount.name: vm.max_map_count
check.mapcount.tooltip: Kernel parameter for memory-mapped files - Wine needs a high value
check.filelimit.name: File Descriptor Limit
check.filelimit.tooltip: Maximum number of open file descriptors per process
check.vulkan.name: Vulkan Support
check.vulkan.tooltip: Vulkan graphics API - required for DXVK translation
check.diskspace.name: Disk Space
check.diskspace.tooltip: At least 100 GB free space recommended
summary.allPassed: All checks passed - your system is ready!
summary.passedWithWarnings: Checks passed with warnings - Star Citizen should work, but performance may be affected.
summary.failed: {{count}} check(s) failed - please resolve before continuing.
fix.mapcount.desc: This will set vm.max_map_count=16777216 system-wide (requires root via pkexec).
fix.filelimit.desc: This will increase the system file descriptor limit (requires root via pkexec).
fix.default.desc: This will modify system settings (requires root).
tooltip.esync: Eventfd-based synchronization - reduces CPU overhead in Wine
tooltip.fsync: Futex-based synchronization - faster than ESync on supported kernels
tooltip.wayland: Enable Wayland protocol support in Wine
tooltip.waylandBlocked: Fractional scaling detected - Wayland mode is not compatible. Set all monitors to 100% scale to use this option.
tooltip.mangohud: On-screen performance overlay (FPS, CPU, GPU, RAM)
tooltip.dxvkHud: DXVK-specific overlay showing draw calls and compiler activity
runner.setPathFirst: Set an install path first to scan for runners.
runner.noRunnersAvailable: No runners available from this source.
desc.installHint: This will create a Wine prefix, install required components (winetricks, DXVK, PowerShell), download and install the RSI Launcher.
error.noRunner: No runner selected. Please go back and select a Wine runner first.
